name: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd
basis: Financials: Ola Electric consolidated (exchange filings). Volumes: electric scooter deliveries.

sources.primary: Ola Electric deliveries from the FY25 annual report; financials from exchange filings (BSE/NSE).
sources.notes: Ola Electric sells electric scooters only — product mix is 100% scooters, powertrain 100% EV, domestic-only. FY22 was the first meaningful commercial year (S1 launch Dec-2021). FY25 deliveries 3.59 lakh per the AR (deliveries basis); note this differs from Vahan registrations (~3.44 lakh), which lag invoiced deliveries.

perFY.FY22: Ola Electric electric-scooter deliveries for FY2021-22, from the Ola Electric FY25 Annual Report's multi-year deliveries track record (BSE scripcode 544225; src/data/source-text/OLA_2025.txt; data/raw-eicher-ola-recent.json). Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.
perFY.FY23: Ola Electric electric-scooter deliveries for FY2022-23, from the Ola Electric FY25 Annual Report's multi-year deliveries track record (BSE scripcode 544225; src/data/source-text/OLA_2025.txt; data/raw-eicher-ola-recent.json). Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.
perFY.FY24: Ola Electric electric-scooter deliveries for FY2023-24, from the Ola Electric FY25 Annual Report's multi-year deliveries track record (BSE scripcode 544225; src/data/source-text/OLA_2025.txt; data/raw-eicher-ola-recent.json). Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.
perFY.FY25: Ola Electric electric-scooter deliveries for FY2024-25, from the Ola Electric FY25 Annual Report's multi-year deliveries track record (BSE scripcode 544225; src/data/source-text/OLA_2025.txt; data/raw-eicher-ola-recent.json). Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.

verification.method: Financials from exchange filings (BSE/NSE). Volumes: electric-scooter deliveries FY22–FY25 from the Ola Electric FY25 annual report (deliveries basis, not Vahan registrations).
verification.upgradePath: Pre-FY22 not applicable (entity pre-commercial; S1 launched Dec-2021).

notes.sources: FY22–FY25 from Ola Electric disclosures / Autocar Professional industry e-2W sales.

productMix.FY22: Ola Electric electric-scooter deliveries for FY2021-22, from the Ola Electric FY25 Annual Report's multi-year deliveries track record (BSE scripcode 544225; src/data/source-text/OLA_2025.txt; data/raw-eicher-ola-recent.json). Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.

Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.

Metric = deliveries (invoiced), not Vahan registrations. Ola is 100% electric scooters.

statusLegend.available: Ola scooter deliveries reported for that FY (company disclosures / industry sales).
statusLegend.derived: Computed: EV mix 100%, domestic 100%, volume growth = YoY of deliveries.
